allow: Bash(sqlcmd -S "\(localdb\)\\MSSQLLocalDB" -d EventsApp -Q "SELECT Email, EmailConfirmed FROM AspNetUsers WHERE Email='test1@example.com';" -W)
Bash(sqlcmd -S "\(localdb\)\\MSSQLLocalDB" -d EventsApp -Q "SELECT UserName, Email, EmailConfirmed FROM AspNetUsers" -W)

Bash(sqlcmd -S "\(localdb\)\\MSSQLLocalDB" -d EventsApp -Q "SELECT u.UserName, r.Name AS Role FROM AspNetUsers u JOIN AspNetUserRoles ur ON u.Id = ur.UserId JOIN AspNetRoles r ON r.Id = ur.RoleId" -W)
